questions.prompt: When to use ERC-1155 over ERC-721?

choices.text: When you need many token types in one contract (games, multi-edition, tickets). Multiple copies per ID supported. Batch transfers 16× cheaper. One contract deploy vs. N for 721 collections.
Templated URI: "https://api.io/items/{id}.json". Clients replace {id} with hex-encoded tokenId. Server returns metadata per id. Saves storage; consistent pattern.
